function.name: search
function.description: Search file contents for a literal substring (not a regex). Returns matching file:line snippets with surrounding context. Skips binary files, build/dependency dirs (node_modules, __pycache__, build, target, …) and .gitignore'd names.

query.description: Literal text to find (not a regex).

path.description: Optional file OR subdirectory (relative to the workspace root) to limit the search; omit to search the whole workspace.

context.description: Lines of surrounding context to include on each side of a match (default 2, max 8; 0 for just the matching line).

case_sensitive.description: Force case sensitivity. Omit for smart-case: case-insensitive unless the query contains an uppercase letter.

max_results.description: Cap on matches returned (default 60). If the result is truncated, narrow the query or set 'path'.
